name: Running along the Vía Verde del Mar
name_original: Running por la Vía Verde del Mar
region_intro: Jogging around Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar offers diverse terrain, blending coastal features with mountainous landscapes. The region is characterized by its Mediterranean coastline, featuring wide sandy beaches and picturesque coves, alongside the Sierra de Oropesa mountain range. Runners can explore well-marked trails through pine forests in areas like Desierto de las Palmas and enjoy scenic routes along the sea. This variety provides options for both casual jogs and more challenging runs with elevation. Best jogging routes around Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar The most popular jogging route is Running along the Vía Verde del Mar, a 6.5 miles (10.5 km) trail that takes 1 hour 6 minutes to complete. This moderate route follows the scenic coastal greenway, offering continuous sea views. Another top favourite among local runners is Marina d'Or Garden – Oropesa del Mar Lighthouse loop from Avda Barcelona/Rattla Terme, a moderate 7.7 miles (12.4 km) path. This route combines coastal running with views of the lighthouse and local gardens. Local runners also love the Marina d'Or Garden – Oropesa del Mar Lighthouse loop from Orpesa, a 7.5 miles (12.1 km) trail leading through coastal areas and past the lighthouse, often completed in about 1 hour 15 minutes. Jogging around Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar is defined by coastal paths, mountain trails, and natural park routes. The network offers options for different ability levels, from flat seaside promenades to more challenging inclines in the hills. The routes in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.4 stars from more than 10 reviews. More than 2000 runners have used komoot to explore Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many running routes are available in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar offers a wide variety of options, with over 50 running routes documented on komoot. These routes cater to different preferences, ranging from easy coastal jogs to more challenging mountain trails.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on running trails in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: The region boasts diverse terrain for runners. You'll find scenic coastal paths, wide sandy beaches with promenades perfect for flat jogs, and more challenging mountain trails within the &lt;strong&gt;Sierra de Oropesa&lt;/strong&gt; and &lt;strong&gt;Desierto de las Palmas&lt;/strong&gt; natural park, offering elevation and stunning views.

Q: Are there easy running routes suitable for beginners in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: Yes, there are several easy running options. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e880635057/running-along-the-via-verde-del-mar" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Running along the Vía Verde del Mar&lt;/a&gt; is a popular choice, offering a flat, scenic coastal path. Additionally, the wide promenades along beaches like La Concha and Morro de Gos are ideal for leisurely jogs.

Q: Are there challenging running trails for experienced runners in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: Absolutely. For those seeking a challenge, the mountainous terrain of the &lt;strong&gt;Sierra de Oropesa&lt;/strong&gt; provides trails with significant elevation. An example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40338027" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Tower of the Rope – La Plana Alta Viewpoint loop from Orpesa&lt;/a&gt;, which is rated as difficult and offers rewarding climbs.

Q: Are there any circular running routes in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: Yes, many routes are designed as loops. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/22061350" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Marina d'Or Garden – Oropesa del Mar Lighthouse loop from Avda Barcelona/Rattla Terme&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate circular path that combines coastal running with views of the lighthouse and local gardens.

Q: What natural features or landmarks can I see while running in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: Runners can enjoy a variety of sights. Coastal routes offer views of picturesque coves like Orpesa la Vella and La Renegá, as well as the iconic Oropesa del Mar Lighthouse. Mountain trails provide panoramic vistas of orange groves, almond trees, and the Mediterranean Sea, with viewpoints like &lt;strong&gt;El Colomer Observatory&lt;/strong&gt; in the &lt;strong&gt;Parc Natural del Desert de les Palmes&lt;/strong&gt;. On clear days, you might even spot the distant &lt;strong&gt;Columbretes Islands&lt;/strong&gt;.

Q: Are there any running routes that pass by viewpoints in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: Yes, several routes offer stunning viewpoints. The &lt;strong&gt;Monte Bovalar&lt;/strong&gt; area, near the town's marina, hosts 'El Mirador,' providing excellent views. Trails within the &lt;strong&gt;Sierra de Oropesa&lt;/strong&gt;, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40338027" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Tower of the Rope – La Plana Alta Viewpoint loop from Orpesa&lt;/a&gt;, also lead to elevated spots with expansive coastal and inland panoramas.

Q: What do other runners enjoy most about jogging in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: The running routes in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.4 stars. Reviewers often praise the diverse landscapes, from the continuous sea views along the Vía Verde del Mar to the peaceful natural environment of the Desierto de las Palmas, and the well-marked paths that cater to all levels.

Q: Are there family-friendly running routes in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: Yes, the flatter, well-maintained paths are great for families. The &lt;strong&gt;Vía Verde del Mar&lt;/strong&gt; is an excellent option, offering a safe and scenic environment for all ages. The wide promenades along the main beaches also provide easy, accessible surfaces for family jogs.

Q: Are there dog-friendly running trails in Orpesa / Oropesa del Mar?
A: Many of the natural trails and less crowded coastal paths are suitable for running with dogs, provided they are kept on a leash and you adhere to local regulations regarding pet access. The trails within the &lt;strong&gt;Desierto de las Palmas&lt;/strong&gt; natural park are generally welcoming for dogs, offering a great natural environment for both you and your pet.

Q: Are there running routes that connect Oropesa del Mar with neighboring towns?
A: Yes, the popular &lt;strong&gt;Vía Verde del Mar&lt;/strong&gt; is a prime example. This 6-kilometer route connects Oropesa del Mar with the neighboring town of Benicàssim, offering a continuous seaside path for a longer run or exploration between the two locations.

Q: Can I find routes that combine coastal views with gardens or urban elements?
A: Certainly. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40338449" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Modern Silver Sculpture – Marina d'Or Garden loop from Avda Barcelona/Rattla Terme&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate route that allows you to enjoy coastal sections alongside the landscaped areas of Marina d'Or Garden, offering a blend of natural beauty and urban design.
tips:
Perhaps one of the most picturesque Greenways in all of Spain.
The route runs along the old railway line that bordered the coastline of both towns. Its length of almost 6 kilometers is suitable for traveling by any means, either by bicycle or on foot, and it also allows people with reduced mobility to enjoy it. The surface is paved in sectors and in other parts it is made of compacted gravel, which makes it very comfortable to walk on.
You will enjoy beautiful views throughout the entire route and if you go with children they will have a great time especially when you cross one of its tunnels through the rock.
